results.text: Globant 3.4 IT Services & Consulting 10001-50000 employees Azure Devops Engineer Bengaluru, Hyderabad, Pune ₹25L - ₹40L/year Azure DevOps, Azure Cloud, Terraform, Docker 6-11 Yrs 2d ago Quick apply Expertise Azure DevOps Terraform Docker Azure Cloud Job Description Role & responsibilities : Who We Are:- We are a digitally native company that helps organizations reinvent themselves and unleash their potential. We are the place where innovation, design and engineering meet scale. With more than 29,000+ employees and present in 33 countries across 5 continents, were partnering with companies like Google, Electronic Arts, and Santander, among others. www.globant.com About CloudOps Studio: CloudOps Studio leverages Globant's Enterprise Cloud Transformation framework to develop a roadmap that factors in the key pillars of a successful journey to cloud: business, people, process and technology. We are combining the best in cloud technologies, DevOps practices, and innovative capabilities to facilitate new and more efficient ways of doing business. We're looking for a hands-on Azure DevOps Engineer to design, build, and operate cloud-native infrastructure and delivery pipelines at scale. What we need 5+ years in DevOps/Platform/Cloud Engineering; 4+ years hands-on Azure Strong Terraform (modules, remote state, workspaces) not just basic usage Solid AKS and Kubernetes fundamentals Scripting in Python, Bash, or PowerShell Good networking basics: VNet, NSG, Private Endpoints, Load Balancers For quick updates share your resume to vivek.singh03@globant.com with below mention details. Total Exp, Relevent exp in Azure, Notice Period, mention last working day of serving, Current CTC, Expected CTC, Current & Preferred Location. View more Compensation CTC range₹25L - ₹40L/year Quick apply Applied All about us Globant 3.4 1315 Reviews Globant India Private Limited Founded: 2003 Headquarters: Pune, Maharashtra 10001-50000 employees
